name: Cumb
equipment: Backpack, bedroll, mess kit, rations ×10, torches ×10, rope 50ft, tinderbox, waterskin
notes: Goblin Rogue 4 — Thief. Small; Speed 30 ft walking AND climbing (Second-Story Work). Darkvision 60 ft. Sneak Attack 2d6. Cunning Action (Dash/Disengage/Hide bonus action) + Nimble Escape. Fast Hands (Sleight of Hand / Utilize / Use Magic Item as bonus action). Steady Aim. Fury of the Small: +2 damage vs larger creatures, 2/LR. Fey Ancestry (adv. vs charmed). Thieves' Cant. Carries the party's Bag of Holding. The goblin who joined the descent (see notes/cumb). Imported from D&D Beyond sheet 2026-07-10.
